---
title: >-
  On Facebook News in the Philippines: 
  Using topic modeling to find trends in online news coverage
description: >-
  Facebook has become one of most visible sources of news in the Philippines,
  and it has arguably played a huge role in shaping Filipino views. We take a
  look at how the Philippines news cycle evolved with by using topic modeling.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 2017-03-12
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
categories:
  - internet 
  - natural language processing
  - data visualization
  - philippines
  - social commentary
preview: cover-social-media.jpg
---
